cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.22)

#  TOOLCHAIN
# Must be set before project(). Uses cmake/arm-none-eabi-toolchain.cmake by
# default. Override on the command line with -DCMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE=<path>.
#
set(CMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/cmake/arm-none-eabi-toolchain.cmake"
    CACHE PATH "Toolchain file")


# ╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# ║  PROJECT CONFIGURATION
# ╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

set(PROJECT_NAME  encoder-rs485)

# Linker script — generated by STM32CubeMX, named after the target part number
set(LINKER_SCRIPT ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/STM32G031G6UX_FLASH.ld)

# MCU CPU flags — STM32G031 is Cortex-M0+
set(MCU_FLAGS  -mcpu=cortex-m0plus  -mthumb)

# Preprocessor defines — match the <listOptionValue> symbols in .cproject
set(COMPILE_DEFS
    USE_HAL_DRIVER
    STM32G031xx
)

set(HAL_DIR       STM32G0xx_HAL_Driver)
set(CMSIS_DEVICE  STM32G0xx)

# NOTE: the .cproject Release config uses -Os (size). This CMakeLists uses -O3
# (speed) as intended. To get byte-identical .elfs from both toolchains,
# change the Release optimization level in .cproject to -O3.

# ╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# ║  END PROJECT CONFIGURATION
# ╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════


#  DEFAULT BUILD TYPE
if(NOT CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE AND NOT CMAKE_CONFIGURATION_TYPES)
    set(CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE Debug CACHE STRING "Build type (Debug or Release)" FORCE)
    message(STATUS "CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE not set — defaulting to Debug (-Og)")
endif()

project(${PROJECT_NAME} C CXX ASM)

set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD    11)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD  17)


#  MCU FLAGS — applied globally so submodule libraries target the correct core
add_compile_options(${MCU_FLAGS})


#  EXTERNAL SUBMODULES
# byte-stuffing exposes: cobs, PPP, bytestream
add_subdirectory(external/stm32-dma-cobs-uart/byte-stuffing)
# dartt-protocol exposes: dartt_protocol (links dartt_checksum internally)
add_subdirectory(external/dartt-protocol)


#  SOURCE FILES
# Exclude Core/Src/PPP.c — the PPP target from the byte-stuffing submodule is
# the correct version and is linked below.
file(GLOB_RECURSE CORE_SRCS "Core/Src/*.c")
list(FILTER CORE_SRCS EXCLUDE REGEX ".*/PPP\\.c$")

file(GLOB_RECURSE HAL_SRCS    "Drivers/${HAL_DIR}/Src/*.c")
file(GLOB         STARTUP_SRC "Core/Startup/*.s")


#  BUILD TARGET
add_executable(${PROJECT_NAME}.elf
    ${CORE_SRCS}
    ${HAL_SRCS}
    ${STARTUP_SRC}
    # dma-uart-src has no CMakeLists, add directly
    external/stm32-dma-cobs-uart/dma-uart-src/m_dma_uart.c
)

target_include_directories(${PROJECT_NAME}.elf PRIVATE
    Core/Inc
    external/stm32-dma-cobs-uart/dma-uart-src
    Drivers/${HAL_DIR}/Inc
    Drivers/${HAL_DIR}/Inc/Legacy
    Drivers/CMSIS/Device/ST/${CMSIS_DEVICE}/Include
    Drivers/CMSIS/Include
)

target_compile_definitions(${PROJECT_NAME}.elf PRIVATE
    ${COMPILE_DEFS}
    $<$<CONFIG:Debug>:DEBUG>
)

target_compile_options(${PROJECT_NAME}.elf PRIVATE
    -fdata-sections
    -ffunction-sections
    -Wall
    -fstack-usage

    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:ASM>:-x assembler-with-cpp>

    $<$<CONFIG:Debug>:  -Og -g3>    # -g3 = DWARF with macro info
    $<$<CONFIG:Release>:-O3 -g0>
)

target_link_options(${PROJECT_NAME}.elf PRIVATE
    ${MCU_FLAGS}
    -specs=nano.specs
    -T${LINKER_SCRIPT}
    -lc -lm
    -Wl,-Map=${PROJECT_NAME}.map,--cref
    -Wl,--gc-sections
)

target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME}.elf PRIVATE
    cobs
    PPP
    dartt_protocol
)


#  POST-BUILD: .hex, .bin, size report
add_custom_command(TARGET ${PROJECT_NAME}.elf POST_BUILD
    COMMAND ${CMAKE_OBJCOPY} -O ihex   $<TARGET_FILE:${PROJECT_NAME}.elf> ${PROJECT_NAME}.hex
    COMMAND ${CMAKE_OBJCOPY} -O binary $<TARGET_FILE:${PROJECT_NAME}.elf> ${PROJECT_NAME}.bin
    COMMAND ${CMAKE_SIZE} --format=berkeley $<TARGET_FILE:${PROJECT_NAME}.elf>
    COMMENT "Generating ${PROJECT_NAME}.hex / .bin"
)
